---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped feature or product improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
Short description of the feature.

## Problem
What user or product problem does this solve?

## User value
Why is this useful for SOC analysts or teams?

## Scope
What is included in this iteration?

## Out of scope
What is explicitly not included?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Risks / dependencies
List technical or product constraints.

## Notes
Add examples, references, or edge cases.
